kw.name: Download
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=rpasession_alias.httpsdrive.google.com, url=https://drive.google.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: An alias for the ``HTTP Get`` keyword.

kw.name: Read table from CSV
kw.msg: ${fre} = Table(columns=['Index', 'Customer Id', 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Company', 'City', 'Country', 'Phone 1', 'Phone 2', 'Email', 'Subscription Date', 'Website'], rows=100)
kw.doc: Read a CSV file as a table.

kw.name: Download
kw.doc: An alias for the ``HTTP Get`` keyword.

kw.name: Read table from CSV
kw.msg: ${de2} = Table(columns=['Index', 'Customer Id', 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Company', 'City', 'Country', 'Phone 1', 'Phone 2', 'Email', 'Subscription Date', 'Website'], rows=1000)
kw.doc: Read a CSV file as a table.
